title: ctenopteris tenuicula
intro: Ctenopteris tenuicula, also known as New Zealand fan fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris tenuicula include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and relieving sinus congestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder for its herbal uses, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
